hero.title: Build a Civilization.
hero.subtitle: Lead one of the 7 great cities of the Ancient World. Gather resources, develop commercial routes, and affirm your military supremacy.

decks.title: Age Decks
decks.text: Prepare Age I, II, and III decks based on player count (3+ on cards).

wonders.title: Wonders
wonders.text: Deal one Wonder board to each player. Determine A or B side.

gameFlow.title: Game Overview
gameFlow.turnsSubtitle: In each Age, players are dealt 7 cards.

step2.title: 2. Reveal & Action
step2.text: Reveal cards and take one action:

step3.title: 3. Pass Hand
step3.text: Pass the remaining cards to the next player.

gameFlow.note: Repeat until 6 cards are played. The 7th card is discarded.

buildStructure.title: Build Structure
buildStructure.text: Pay the resource cost shown on the card to build it.
buildStructure.trading: Trading: Purchase missing resources from neighbors for 2 coins each (unless you have a trading post).

buildWonder.title: Build Wonder Stage
buildWonder.text: Tuck the card under your Wonder board and pay the stage cost. The card's effect is ignored.

discard.title: Discard for Coins
discard.text: Discard the card face down to the discard pile.

endOfAge.title: End of Age: Military Conflict
endOfAge.comparison: Compare military shields with your left and right neighbors.

military.title: Military Conflicts
military.text: Points from Victory tokens minus Defeat tokens.

treasury.title: Treasury
treasury.text: 1 Point for every 3 coins in your treasury.

civil.title: Civil Structures
civil.text: Sum of victory points on Blue structures.

scientific.title: Scientific
scientific.text: Score sets of identical symbols and sets of 3 different symbols.

expert2p.title: 2-Player Variant (Expert)
expert2p.subtitle: Requires the Free City board.
expert2p.freeCity: Free City: Players take turns controlling a neutral 3rd city.
expert2p.control: Control: The player whose card has the highest military strength controls the Free City for that turn.

hero.title: Wisdom guides the age.
hero.subtitle: Recruit Leaders to provide unique benefits and guide your strategy.

recruitment.title: Recruitment Phase
recruitment.text: Start of each Age: Recruit, Build Wonder, or Sell a Leader.

hero.title: Underground empires rise.
hero.subtitle: Mercenaries, thieves, and spies enter the fray. Cities adds aggressive interaction and debt.

cards.title: Cities Cards
cards.text: Shuffle Cities cards into each Age deck (1 per player). 8 cards per player/Age.

gameFlow.title: Game Flow
gameFlow.note: Since 8 cards are dealt, you will play 7 cards per Age (one more than base game).

debts.title: Debts
debts.text: If you cannot pay monetary losses caused by others, take Debt tokens (-VP).

diplomacy.title: Diplomacy
diplomacy.text: Dove symbol. Place a diplomacy token to skip the next Military Conflict phase.

debt.title: Debt
debt.text: Subtract VP for held Debt tokens at end of game.

freeCity.title: Team Play
freeCity.subtitle: 2 vs 2 or 3 vs 3
freeCity.play: Teammates sit next to each other and can discuss strategies.

hero.title: Conquer the horizon.
hero.subtitle: Build a fleet to explore, trade, and conquer. Armada adds a naval board and ship progression.

ships.title: Ships
ships.text: Place Red, Yellow, Blue, Green ships on starting spaces.

cards.title: Armada Cards
cards.text: Shuffle Armada cards into Age decks (1 per player).

step2.title: 2. Naval Action
step2.text: If you built a card, you may pay costs to advance the matching colored ship.

navalOpportunity.title: Naval Opportunity
navalOpportunity.text: Can pay cost to move matching ship 1 space.

buildWonder.title: Build Wonder
buildWonder.naval: Choose one color ship to advance (pay cost).

discard.title: Discard
discard.text: Gain 3 coins. No naval movement allowed.

endOfAge.title: End of Age
endOfAge.order: Resolve Ground War then Naval War.

navalWar.title: 2. Naval Conflict
navalWar.text: Compare Blue fleet strength with ALL players. Weakest players take malus tokens.

expert2p.title: 2-Player Expert
expert2p.freeCity: Use Free City rules for 3rd neutral player.
expert2p.play: Neutral player does not have a naval board.

hero.title: Build together or fall alone.
hero.subtitle: Collaborate on Edifices for rewards, or ignore them at your peril.

step2.title: 2. Build
step2.text: If building Wonder stage, you can participate in Edifice.

participation.title: Participation
participation.text: When building a Wonder stage, pay Edifice cost to place a pawn on the Edifice. Limit 1 pawn per Edifice.

edificeCheck.title: 1. Edifice Check
edificeCheck.text: If Edifice is full (or enough players participated), it is complete. Participants get rewards. If failed, non-participants lose resources/VP.

hero.title: Conquer the waves, rule from the shadows.
hero.subtitle: The naval exploration of Armada meets the aggressive diplomacy of Cities.

armada.title: Armada
armada.text: Place Dockyard. Shuffle Armada cards into Age decks. Deal 9 cards/hand.

cities.title: Cities
cities.text: Shuffle Cities cards into Age decks.

step2.title: 2. Naval Action
step2.text: Optional: Advance ship if colors match.

navalOpportunity.title: Naval Opportunity
navalOpportunity.text: If card matches Dockyard color, pay cost to advance ship.

buildWonder.title: Build Wonder
buildWonder.text: Use card to build Wonder stage. Naval: Advance matching ship.

discard.title: Discard
discard.text: Gain 3 Coins | Move Yellow Ship (Free)

debtsDiplomacy.title: Debts & Diplomacy
debtsDiplomacy.text:
Debt: -VP for unpaid losses.
Diplomacy: Skip ground conflict.

fleets.title: Fleets
fleets.text:
Red: Naval Strength.
Green: Explore Islands.
Blue: VP.
Yellow: Coins/Taxes.

hero.title: Build, Conquer, Conspire.
hero.subtitle: Armada, Cities, and Edifice combine for a rich, complex experience.

buildStructure.title: Build
buildStructure.chain: Chains: Edifice & Cities symbols allow free builds.

expert2p.title: 2-Player
expert2p.subtitle: Expert Mode Changes
expert2p.li1: Free City participates in Naval War.
expert2p.li2: Free City CAN participate in Edifice.
expert2p.li3: Free City pays for its own Participation.

hero.title: Build monuments, chart the seas.
hero.subtitle: Armada and Edifice combine for a grand construction and exploration race.

discard.title: Discard
discard.text: Gain 3 Coins | Move Yellow Ship (Free)

debts.title: Penalties
debts.text: Failure to complete Edifice results in penalty.

expert2p.title: 2-Player
expert2p.li1: Free City plays Naval and Edifice.
expert2p.li2: Free City pays its own costs.

hero.title: Lead, Build, Sail.
hero.subtitle: Armada, Leaders, and Edifice create a massive strategic puzzle.

buildWonder.title: Build Wonder
buildWonder.exclusive: Choose ONLY ONE bonus action (Naval OR Edifice)

expert2p.title: 2-Player
expert2p.li1: Free City plays Naval and Edifice.
expert2p.li2: Free City pays its own costs.

hero.title: Command the waves, rule the court.
hero.subtitle: The naval might of Armada meets the political intrigue of Cities and the strategic depth of Leaders.

treasury.title: Treasury
treasury.text: Start with 6 Coins (Cities/Leaders rule overrides Base rule of 3).

armada.title: Armada
armada.text: Place Dockyard. Shuffle Armada cards into Age decks (1 per player). Deal 8 cards/hand.

cities.title: Cities
cities.text: Shuffle Black cards into Age decks (1 per player). Final hand size: 9 cards.

draft.title: Phase 1: Leader Draft
draft.subtitle: Draft Your Court
draft.text: Before Age I, draft 4 Leaders. (Pick 1, Pass Right).

recruitment.title: Start of Age: Recruitment
recruitment.text: Play 1 Leader before dealing Age cards.

step1.title: Choose Card
step1.text: Hand size is 9 cards (7 Base + 1 City + 1 Armada). Pick one.

step2.title: Pass Hand
step2.text: Age I & III: Left. Age II: Right.

navalOpportunity.title: Naval Opportunity
navalOpportunity.text: If card matches Dockyard color (Red/Yellow/Blue/Green), you may pay cost to advance ship.

debtsDiplomacy.title: Debts & Diplomacy
debtsDiplomacy.text:
Debt: -1 VP per unpaid coin.
Diplomacy (Dove): Withdraw from next Ground Conflict. (Neighbors fight each other).

armadaFleets.title: Armada Fleets
armadaFleets.text:
Islands: Explore for bonuses.
Fleets: Tax, VP, Strength.

hero.title: Lead nations, chart new horizons.
hero.subtitle: The naval exploration of Armada meets the strategic leadership of Leaders.

armada.title: Armada
armada.text: Place Dockyard. Shuffle Armada cards into Age decks (1 per player). Deal 8 cards/hand.

leaders.title: Leaders
leaders.text: Deal 4 Leader cards. Shuffle Guilds into Age III.

draft.title: Phase 1: Leader Draft
draft.subtitle: Draft Your Court
draft.text: Before Age I, draft 4 Leaders. (Pick 1, Pass Right).

recruitment.title: Start of Age: Recruitment
recruitment.text: Play 1 Leader before dealing Age cards.

step1.title: Choose Card
step1.text: Hand size is 8 cards. Pick one.

step2.title: Pass Hand
step2.text: Age I & III: Left. Age II: Right.

navalOpportunity.title: Naval Opportunity
navalOpportunity.text: If card matches Dockyard color, pay cost to advance ship.

buildWonder.title: Build Wonder Stage
buildWonder.naval: Naval: Check Dockyard "Start" space. Pay cost for THAT color ship.

discard.title: Discard
discard.text: Gain 3 Coins | Move Yellow Ship (Free)

freeCity.title: The Free City
freeCity.leaders: Leaders: Drafted by players. Free City gets NONE.

hero.title: Build legacies, navigate intrigue.
hero.subtitle: The dark diplomacy of Cities meets the collaborative grandeur of Edifice.

cities.title: Cities
cities.text: Shuffle Black cards into Age decks (1 per player). Deal 8 cards/hand.

edifice.title: Edifice
edifice.text: Place 1 Project/Age. Add Participation Pawns (fewer than players).

tokens.title: Tokens
tokens.text: Prepare Debt Tokens (-1, -2, -3, -5) and Diplomacy Doves.

step1.title: Choose Card
step1.text: Hand size is 8 cards. Pick one.

step2.title: Pass Hand
step2.text: Age I & III: Left. Age II: Right.

participation.title: Participation Option
participation.text: Pay Participation Cost listed on Edifice card to take a Pawn.

debtsDiplomacy.title: Debts & Diplomacy
debtsDiplomacy.text:
Debt: -1 VP per unpaid coin.
Diplomacy (Dove): Withdraw from next Ground Conflict. (Neighbors fight each other).

edificeResults.title: Edifice Results
edificeResults.text:
Built: Rewards for pawns.
Failed: Penalty if NO pawn (Debt if can't pay).

edificeCheck.title: 1. Edifice Check
edificeCheck.text:
Completed: Gain Reward.
Failed: Pay Penalty or take Debt.

freeCity.title: The Free City
freeCity.draw: Draw: Add to hand, then play for self + Free City.

hero.title: Lead nations, build legacies.
hero.subtitle: The strategic depth of Leaders meets the communal grandeur of Edifice.

leaders.title: Leaders
leaders.text: Deal 4 Leader cards. Shuffle Guilds into Age III.

edifice.title: Edifice
edifice.text: Place 1 Project/Age. Add Participation Pawns (fewer than players).

tokens.title: Tokens
tokens.text: Prepare Debt Tokens (-2, -3, -5) for failed Edifices.

draft.title: Phase 1: Leader Draft
draft.subtitle: Draft Your Court
draft.text: Before Age I, draft 4 Leaders. (Pick 1, Pass Right).

gameplay.title: Phase 2: Gameplay

recruitment.title: Start of Age: Recruitment
recruitment.text: Play 1 Leader before dealing Age cards.

step1.title: Choose Card
step1.text: Hand size is 7 cards. Pick one.

step2.title: Pass Hand
step2.text: Age I & III: Left. Age II: Right.

gameplay.note: *On the 6th turn, play one card and discard the 7th facedown.

participation.title: Participation Option
participation.text: Pay Participation Cost listed on Edifice card to take a Pawn.

edificeCheck.title: 1. Edifice Check
edificeCheck.text:
Completed: Gain Reward.
Failed: Pay Penalty or take Debt.

freeCity.title: The Free City
freeCity.leaders: Leaders: Drafted by players. Free City gets NONE.

hero.title: Lead from the shadows, build for eternity.
hero.subtitle: The political maneuvering of Cities meets the strategic depth of Leaders and the collaborative projects of Edifice.

leaders.title: Leaders
leaders.text: Deal 4 Leaders to each player. Draft them at the start of the game.

cities.title: Cities
cities.text: Shuffle Cities cards into each Age deck (player count = cards added).

edifice.title: Edifice
edifice.text: Place 1 Edifice card per Age (I, II, III) on the board.

draft.title: Leader Phase
draft.subtitle: Drafting Leaders
draft.text: At the start of the game, before Age I.

recruitment.title: Recruitment Phase
recruitment.text: At the start of each Age (before dealing Age cards), recruit one Leader:

recruit.title: Recruit
recruit.text: Pay cost to play a Leader.

wonder.title: Build Wonder
wonder.text: Use Leader to build a Wonder stage.

step1.title: 1. Play a Card
step1.text: Build Structure, Build Wonder Stage, or Discard for Coins.

step2.title: 2. Edifice Check
step2.text: If you build a Wonder stage/Edifice, consider Edifice participation.

step3.title: 3. Pass Hands
step3.text: Pass remaining cards to the next player.

participation.title: Participation
participation.text: When building a Wonder stage, pay the Edifice cost to gain a participation pawn.

discard.title: Discard for Coins
discard.text: Discard a card to gain 3 Coins (plus bonuses).

debtsDiplomacy.title: Debts & Diplomacy
debtsDiplomacy.text:
Debt: Lose coins or take debt tokens (-VP).
Diplomacy: Avoid military conflicts this Age.

edificeResults.title: Edifice Results
edificeResults.text:
Complete: All participants gain rewards.
Incomplete: All non-participants pay a penalty.

edificeCheck.title: 1. Edifice Check
edificeCheck.text:
Check if the Edifice is completed (pawns filled).
Distribute rewards or penalties.

groundWar.title: 2. Military Conflict
groundWar.text: Compare shields with neighbors. Apply Diplomacy tokens.

military.title: Military
military.text: Sum of Victory tokens minus Defeat tokens.

scientific.title: Scientific
scientific.text: Sets of identical symbols and sets of 3 different symbols.

debt.title: Debts
debt.text: Subtract points for each Debt token.

freeCity.title: Free City (Team Play)
freeCity.draw: Draw 2 cards, keep 1, play implies team rules.
freeCity.play: Teammates can show cards and discuss strategy.

hero.title: Tactical genius, ruthless diplomacy.
hero.subtitle: The Cities expansion adds mercenary and diplomatic depth, while Leaders enables long-term strategic planning.

leaders.title: Leaders
leaders.text: Deal 4 Leaders to each player. Draft phase occurs before Age I.

cities.title: Cities
cities.text: Shuffle Cities cards into each Age deck (1 per player).

recruitment.title: Recruitment (Start of Age)
recruitment.text: Before each Age, recruit a Leader.

step2.title: 2. Resolve Effects
step2.text: Resolve debts, diplomacy, or other immediate effects.

construct.title: Construct
construct.text: Pay costs. Cities cards often cost coins.

buildWonder.title: Build Wonder
buildWonder.text: Use a card to build a Wonder stage.

debtsDiplomacy.title: Debts & Diplomacy
debtsDiplomacy.text: City cards can cause opponents to lose coins (or take Debt). Diplomacy tokens prevent participation in the next war.

groundWar.title: Military Conflict
groundWar.text: Standard military resolution. Diplomacy tokens are discarded after avoiding one conflict.

boards.title: Dockyards
boards.text: Each player receives a Naval board (Dockyard) and 4 ships.

edifice.title: Edifices
edifice.text: Place 1 Edifice card per Age. Distribute participation pawns.

cities.title: Cities
cities.text: Shuffle Cities cards into each Age deck (1 per player).

leaders.title: Leaders
leaders.text: Shuffle Leaders and deal 4 to each player. Draft them at the start.

islands.title: Islands
islands.text: Place the 3 Island decks near the board.

recruitment.title: Recruitment
recruitment.text: Start of each Age: Play 1 Leader.

step1.title: 1. Pick Card
step1.text: Choose 1 card from 9. Resolution is simultaneous.

step2.title: 2. Action
step2.text: Build, Wonder, or Discard. If building, you may take a Naval action.

step3.title: 3. Pass
step3.text: Pass the remaining cards (8 cards played per Age).

navalOpportunity.title: Naval Construction
navalOpportunity.text: If card matches Dockyard color, pay cost to move matching ship.

participation.title: Edifice Participation
participation.text: When building a Wonder stage, you may pay to participate in the current Edifice.

naval.title: Naval Construction
naval.text: Advance the ship corresponding to the color of the built stage.

discard.title: Discard
discard.text: Gain 3 Coins and move your Yellow Ship 1 space (free).

debtsDiplomacy.title: Debts & Diplomacy
debtsDiplomacy.text: Cities: Manage monetary losses and skip conflicts with Diplomacy tokens.

edificeResults.title: Edifice Projects
edificeResults.text: Edifice: Collaborate to finish projects. Failure leads to penalties for non-participants.

armadaFleets.title: Naval Exploration
armadaFleets.text: Armada: Advance your 4 ships to gain strength, gold, and explore islands.

endOfAge.title: End of Age Resolution
endOfAge.order: Strict resolution order: Edifice -> Ground War -> Naval War.

edificeCheck.title: 1. Edifice
edificeCheck.text: Check project completion. Distribute rewards or penalties.

groundWar.title: 2. Ground War
groundWar.text: Compare Red shields with neighbors (unless Diplomacy is active).

navalWar.title: 3. Naval War
navalWar.text: Compare Blue strength against all players.

fallback.title: Select Expansions
fallback.text: Select the expansions you are playing with above to see the specific rules and interactions for that combination.
